coach_notes: The gaps in 'customerservice', 'teamwork', and 'communication' are most critical because arts-media roles often involve collaborating with clients, teams, and stakeholders to execute projects like events or content creation. Without these skills, you may struggle to effectively present ideas, coordinate activities, or manage the application process for opportunities. To address this, practice active listening in group settings and seek feedback on your interpersonal interactions.

jobs.title: Junior Designer
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your graphic design, creative, and content skills directly match junior designer role. Experience with design tools and events shows you can create visual materials.
jobs.gaps: No professional design experience listed. May need to provide portfolio. Junior level may expect some agency or in-house work.

jobs.title: Level I Instructional Designer (contract contingent)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your background in content creation, design, and events suggests you can develop instructional materials and manage learning activities. Experience with databases and Google tools supports content organization and delivery.
jobs.gaps: No direct instructional design experience or formal training in learning theories. Contract role may require prior portfolio of instructional materials.

jobs.title: Fall 2026 Creative (Paid) Intern
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your creative skills, graphic design, and content creation align with a creative internship. Experience with events and activities shows you can contribute to team projects.
jobs.gaps: No specific creative internship experience. May need to demonstrate portfolio of creative work. Internship is for Fall 2026, so timing is far out.

jobs.title: Planning Technician
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your database skills and experience with Google Maps could be relevant to planning tasks. Attention to detail from design work may help.
jobs.gaps: No planning or technical background. Requires knowledge of zoning, land use, or municipal processes. High school diploma may not meet minimum requirements.

jobs.title: A&F Co. Design Sophomore Summit - Summer 2026
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your creative and design skills align with a design summit. Experience with activities and events shows you can collaborate in a team setting.
jobs.gaps: No specific fashion or retail design experience. Summit is for sophomores, and your high school diploma may not meet college student requirement. Need to confirm eligibility.
